# Interim Data Directory

This directory holds **intermediate** data files produced during the cleaning
and feature-engineering pipeline steps.

## Expected Files (auto-generated by notebook)

| File | Step | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `cleaned.csv` | Step 2 | Deduplicated + null-handled dataset |
| `features.csv` | Step 4 | Dataset with engineered payload features added |

## Notes

- Generated automatically when running `notebooks/01_eda.ipynb`.
- Excluded from Git; re-generate by running the pipeline.
- Use these files to resume from Step 3 without re-downloading data.
